name: Play the Diabell
name_jp: プレイ・ザ・ディアベル
desc: If a Spell/Trap(s) is sent to the GY to activate a card or effect: Send 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster from your hand, Deck, or Extra Deck to the GY. During your Main Phase: You can banish 3 Spells/Traps from your GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Diabell" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Play the Diabell" once per turn.
eff: If a Spell/Trap(s) is sent to the GY to activate a card or effect: Send 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster from your hand, Deck, or Extra Deck to the GY. During your Main Phase: You can banish 3 Spells/Traps from your GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Diabell" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Play the Diabell" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
